categories.description: Sent to the new hire when their Staff row transitions pre_hire → active. Includes onboarding checklist link + first-day details + emergency contact from branch manager.
Sent to HR + branch manager when a staff enters offboarding state. Includes the termination reason (redacted to non-HR recipients), planned ended_at, and a checklist link.
Sent to team members (Wave 3+ Teams module) when a coach or team-assigned staff is offboarded. Cannot-opt-out because the team needs to know who their new point-of-contact is.
Sent to every active staff of a branch when a new branch manager is promoted. Cannot-opt-out — org-chart transparency.
Sent to the coach + their branch manager at 30, 14, 7-day pre-expiry thresholds. Includes the certification details + renewal-lookup link.
Sent to HR at 14 / 7 / 1-day pre-expiry thresholds. HR reviews performance + decides whether to promote to permanent, extend, or terminate.

PRIVATE-TIER. Sent to the affected staff ONLY (never to peers or branch manager). Includes the effective_at date + the new pay_frequency. Delivered through the HR channel — never renders in the tenant activity feed or in-app default inbox.
categories.notes: Delivered on the compensation-audit queue, not the normal notifications queue. Compliance audit row written on every dispatch.

categories.description: Sent to active team members (Wave 3+) when their coach transitions to on_leave OR paused. Cannot-opt-out — team members need to know who to reach for cover.

Sent to the branch manager when a staff is suspended (audit-critical). Distinct from the notification to the suspended staff themselves (which is delivered through the HR channel as a formal letter — not this category).
